name: google-workspace-mcp
description: google-workspace-mcp — a multi-account Gmail + Calendar + Drive + Tasks MCP server for Claude Code, packaged as an installable plugin (also its own marketplace).

plugins.name: google-workspace-mcp
plugins.description: Drive Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, and Google Tasks across any number of Google accounts in parallel from one MCP server. Every tool takes an `account` slug, so a single Claude session can email from one account, file in another's Drive, and book a calendar event in a third. Works around the default single-account connector (which also can't delete drafts). Available in every project once installed.
